description: User builds Valorheim kingdom: founding, geography, political structure, key locations

turns.content: I want to create a kingdom called Valorheim. It was founded 800 years ago by King Aldric the First.
Created Valorheim as a location. Founded 800 years ago by Aldric I.
Valorheim is in the northern mountains, bordered by the Frostmere Sea to the west and the Dragon's Spine range to the east.
Updated Valorheim geography: northern mountains, Frostmere Sea (west), Dragon's Spine (east).
The capital city is Solara, built at the confluence of two rivers: the Bright and the Shadow.
Created Solara as the capital of Valorheim, at the Bright-Shadow river confluence.
Valorheim uses a council system. The Ruling Council has 7 seats: the Crown, the Sword, the Quill, the Coin, the Flame, the Shield, and the Star.
Documented the 7-seat Ruling Council of Valorheim.
The current king is Aldric VII. He's been ruling for 12 years.
Created Aldric VII, current king, 12 years on throne.
The currency is called Aurens. 1 gold Auren = 10 silver Marks = 100 copper Bits.
Documented Aurens currency: gold/silver/copper denominations.
There's a rival kingdom to the south called Thornwall. They've been enemies for 300 years since the War of Broken Oaths.
Created Thornwall. 300-year rivalry, War of Broken Oaths.
Valorheim's military is called the Frostguard. Their commander is General Brianna Ironhelm.
Created the Frostguard military and General Brianna Ironhelm.
The main religion worships the Twin Moons — Lunara (silver moon, wisdom) and Solus (golden moon, courage).
Created Twin Moons religion: Lunara (wisdom) and Solus (courage).
The Mage Tower in Solara is run by Archmage Celine. She's 200 years old thanks to life-extension magic.
Created Archmage Celine, 200 years old, leads Mage Tower in Solara.
Valorheim's chief export is moonstone, mined from the Shimmering Caverns beneath Dragon's Spine.
Documented moonstone trade from Shimmering Caverns.
The Frostmere Sea is home to the Tidecallers, a semi-autonomous fishing clan with their own traditions.
Created the Tidecallers, semi-autonomous fishing clan on Frostmere Sea.
Annual festival: the Night of Twin Stars, held when both moons are full. Biggest holiday in Valorheim.
Documented Night of Twin Stars festival.

facts.fact: Valorheim was founded 800 years ago by Aldric the First
Frostmere Sea borders Valorheim to the west
Dragon's Spine mountain range borders to the east
Capital city is Solara, at confluence of Bright and Shadow rivers
Ruling Council has 7 seats: Crown, Sword, Quill, Coin, Flame, Shield, Star
Current king is Aldric VII, ruling for 12 years
Currency: Aurens (1 gold = 10 silver Marks = 100 copper Bits)
Thornwall is rival kingdom, 300-year enmity since War of Broken Oaths
Military: Frostguard, led by General Brianna Ironhelm
Archmage Celine is 200 years old, leads Mage Tower in Solara
Chief export: moonstone from Shimmering Caverns
Tidecallers are semi-autonomous fishing clan on Frostmere Sea
Night of Twin Stars is biggest annual festival, both moons full
